# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: EnvoyFilter
metadata:
  name: envoy-debugging
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      istio: sidecar
  configPatches:
    - applyTo: NETWORK_FILTER
      match:
        context: SIDECAR_INBOUND
        listener:
          filterChain:
            filter:
              name: "envoy.http_connection_manager"
      patch:
        operation: MERGE
        value:
          config:
            admin:
              access_log_path: /dev/null
              address:
                socket_address:
                  address: 0.0.0.0
                  port_value: 15000
            admin_access_log_path: /dev/null
            admin_address:
              socket_address:
                address: 0.0.0.0
                port_value: 15000
            admin_interface:
              hidden_envoy_deprecated_use_only_for_test: false
              profile_path: "/debug/pprof"
              address:
                socket_address:
                  protocol: "TCP"
                  address: "{{ Getenv "POD_IP" }}"
                  port_value: 15000
            listeners:
              admin:
                "address":
                  "socket_address":
                    "address": "0.0.0.0"
                    "port_value": 15000
              name: combine admins
              trafficDirection: INBOUND
              filterChains:
                filters:
                - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
                  configFile:
                    inlineString: |
                      {
                        "stat_prefix": "stats",
                        "route_config": {
                          "virtual_hosts": [
                            {
                              "name": "admin",
                              "domains": ["*"],
                              "routes": [
                                {
                                  "match": { "prefix": "/config_dump"},
                                  "direct_response": { "status": 200, "body": { "filename": "/dev/null" } }
                                },
                                {
                                  "match": { "prefix": "/stats"},
                                  "direct_response": { "status": 200, "body": { "filename": "/dev/null" } }
                                },
                                {
                                  "match": { "prefix": "/clusters"},
                                  "direct_response": { "status": 200, "body": { "filename": "/dev/null" } }
                                }
                              ]
                            }
                          ]
                        }
                      }
